title: Vitax Nippon Fly & Wasp Killer 300ml
features: FAST-ACTING INSECT CONTROL: Nippon Fly & Wasp Killer Aerosol kills flies, wasps, mosquitoes, midges, and other flying insects on contact for quick results.
EFFECTIVE KNOCKDOWN: Spray directly towards insects from a distance of 90-150cm for immediate elimination, making it ideal for swift pest control.
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for use anywhere in the home, including living areas, kitchens, and bathrooms, clearing rooms of insects in minutes.
POWERFUL FORMULA: Contains permethrin and tetramethrin for a potent, reliable insecticide that delivers a fast and effective knockdown.

EASY APPLICATION: Close doors and windows, spray short bursts around the room, then leave the room and close the door for 10-15 minutes. Shake well before use and avoid contact with food surfaces. Always read the label and product information before use, and keep out of reach of children and pets.
description: Product Description Vitax Nippon Fly & Wasp Killer 300ml An aerosol space spray to control flies, wasps, mosquitoes, midges and other flying insects in and around the home. Fast acting with immediate effect on contact. Can be used in the home in food preparation and storage areas. Contains Permethrin and Tetramethrin. Apply: At the first signs of fly activity. How to Use:- Spray the pest in short bursts from a distance of 90-150cm.- Can be sprayed into a room with all doors and windows closed where insects are present. Spray several short bursts, shut the door and leave the room for 10-15mins. Box Contains 1 x Nippon Fly & Wasp Aerosol
